About Me

Engineering solutions for real-world impact.

Hi, I'm Nikhil Sai Kenguri — a B.Tech Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning student from India with a strong interest in Full Stack Development, AI-powered systems, Open Source Software, and emerging technologies.

Currently contributing to CrowdFAQ through IIT Ropar's VLED Lab Open Source Internship while continuously expanding my skills in React, Node.js, MongoDB, AI tools, and React Native development.

I enjoy building innovative solutions that combine technology, creativity, and problem-solving to create meaningful impact.
